description: Add a computed attribute 'pop_density' to the 'ne_countries' table in the PostGIS database (container 'gs-postgis', user 'geoserver', db 'gis', password 'geoserver123'). The 'pop_density' attribute should be calculated as 'pop_est' divided by the area in square kilometers. Update the 'ne_countries' feature type in the GeoServer 'ne' workspace so the new attribute is recognized and published. Verify the attribute is exposed via WFS by saving a GetFeature response in JSON format containing at least 3 features to /home/ga/output/wfs_countries_with_density.json.
